# Salvo

## Observed Text

- Cost: 1
- Type/Rarity: Attack / Rare
- Target: AnyEnemy
- Base: Deal 12 damage. Retain your Hand this turn.

<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Retaining the hand can preserve boss answers for scripted turns, but the shop price and deck-size cost must beat removal or potion support.
